---
layout: default
title: "National Political and Legislative Brief: July 12, 2026"
date: 2026-07-12T06:16:17.614226+00:00
summary: "Key developments include high-profile party defections, legislative hurdles for women's reservation, and judicial calls for arbitration reform"
run_time_ist: "11:46AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 11:46AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>TMC defections:</strong> Three former Trinamool Congress Rajya Sabha MPs, including Sushmita Dev, have joined the BJP, marking a significant political shift in West Bengal.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative setbacks:</strong> The Constitutional Amendment Bill aimed at securing women’s reservation in the Lok Sabha and State Assemblies has failed to pass in the Lok Sabha.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPSTVKRHVGUXlhNjVqNEczYkNpd1NvbmRYOU5Fd2RIZjV3OHBob0owSzh3LVRXdUVqSDNVZTgtbVZlUG8ybS1wallfSVdTeTRtNENIU0lwV3piczdxV2NEVmE0WC1GSTQyMjR4dkNPb1pqblB2SzNHQjZBRWVXZHpPZXE2bVlQc3NGNEFJVU1NUHJMMFFqSkdRUVFFMGZNRUkzSTc0LXphM1JaLXM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Judicial intervention:</strong> The Chief Justice of India has formally urged the government to introduce the Arbitration Council of India bill in Parliament to streamline dispute resolution.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W5</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxPRmYzbEg0ejBQLWlrR0NTVXpGamRaTXZYQVVEUXNnNTdOY09FUFY1WTItYXI5VzZEbHdtSWVoT1FqMlhZQ3p0NWxHQ2FmbGJ1VnM2M3E5ZEwybVVoSXdPcDY2QkIxRmRwMGRtQ2EwVU03SHNYWFlxdzZqX2UxdjZ6X2pJZUtQbVd3cmhHYVpSZUxyS0ZwVmswU25TT1U2RWY1R3Z4bQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Electoral process scrutiny:</strong> The Election Commission is facing criticism from UN special rapporteurs over the transparency of the new voter registration process, even as it updates Form 6 to include parental details.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W7</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>International diplomacy:</strong> Prime Minister Narendra Modi has become the first Indian leader to address the Indonesian Parliament, highlighting India&#x27;s expanding diplomatic footprint.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxPRmYzbEg0ejBQLWlrR0NTVXpGamRaTXZYQVVEUXNnNTdOY09FUFY1WTItYXI5VzZEbHdtSWVoT1FqMlhZQ3p0NWxHQ2FmbGJ1VnM2M3E5ZEwybVVoSXdPcDY2QkIxRmRwMGRtQ2EwVU03SHNYWFlxdzZqX2UxdjZ6X2pJZUtQbVd3cmhHYVpSZUxyS0ZwVmswU25TT1U2RWY1R3Z4bQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a></span></li>
</ul>
